# Sunrise Specialty Partners

## About
Sunrise Specialty Partners is a commercial janitorial marketplace serving the San Francisco Bay Area. We connect office spaces with vetted, competing cleaning providers — so businesses get transparent pricing, reliable service, and a better overall experience than going directly to a single vendor. Getting proposals is free and there is no commitment required.

## How It Works
1. Office submits a request describing their space, location, and cleaning needs (takes ~2 minutes)
2. Sunrise matches the office with vetted providers from their network
3. Office receives 3+ competing proposals with pricing, service tiers, and provider details
4. Office selects their preferred provider; Sunrise handles coordination

## Who We Serve
- Commercial office spaces across the San Francisco Bay Area
- Property managers, office managers, and facilities teams at small to mid-sized businesses
- Companies that want vetted, insured, background-checked cleaning professionals without having to shop around manually

## Provider Vetting Standards
Every provider must meet all six criteria to join the network and maintain them to stay:
- 4.5+ star rating across commercial accounts
- Licensed and fully insured with commercial liability coverage
- 3+ years of commercial cleaning experience
- High client retention rates (consistent, long-term service record)
- Background-checked staff cleared before entering any building
- Ongoing quality reviews after every new client match

## Pricing
- Proposals are always free with no obligation
- Cleaning costs vary by office size, location, and frequency
- Competing bids surface fair market pricing for your specific space
- No contracts required; service levels can be adjusted anytime

## Service Area
San Francisco Bay Area — 60+ cities including San Francisco, San Jose, Oakland, Palo Alto, Redwood City, Mountain View, Sunnyvale, Santa Clara, Fremont, Hayward, Berkeley, and the Peninsula corridor

## Contact
- Phone: (650) 722-4998
- Website: https://sunrisespecialtypartners.com
- Get a free quote: https://sunrisespecialtypartners.com/quote.html

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is Sunrise Specialty Partners?
A: A Bay Area commercial janitorial network that pairs office spaces with vetted cleaning professionals. Providers submit competing bids so clients get transparent pricing and the best fit for their space.

Q: How much does commercial office cleaning cost in the Bay Area?
A: Pricing varies based on office size, location, and cleaning frequency. Sunrise surfaces multiple competing bids so you can see where fair market pricing lands for your specific space. Getting proposals is always free.

Q: Is there a contract or commitment?
A: No. You receive proposals, compare them, and only move forward if you find a fit. Terms are straightforward and you can adjust service levels anytime.

Q: How are providers vetted?
A: Every provider must pass background checks, carry commercial liability insurance, have 3+ years of commercial cleaning experience, and provide verified references. Sunrise conducts quality reviews after every new client match.

Q: How quickly will I receive proposals?
A: Most clients receive proposals within 48 hours of submitting their request.

Q: Can I compare multiple providers?
A: Yes — that's the core model. You receive 3+ competing proposals side by side, with pricing and service details, so you can choose the best fit.

## What Makes Us Different
- Marketplace model: multiple providers compete for your business, not a single vendor take-it-or-leave-it quote
- All providers are pre-vetted before they can submit a single bid
- Free proposals with no obligation or contracts required
- Focused exclusively on commercial office spaces in the Bay Area
- Modern job management and coordination handled by Sunrise after you select a provider
